# Thermometry

**Summary**: The measurement of temperature to determine the physiological limits of organisms.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] used thermometry to establish upper thermal limits for gastropods and ostracods in the Arabian Gulf.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Both gastropods and ostracods showed elevated upper thermal tolerance when immersed in water during trials reaching up to 60°C. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 31]])
